title: Multiple Wallets
description: Multiple wallets means separating funds into distinct wallet buckets inside one application based on purpose, ownership, or security model. A spending wallet, shared wallet, savings wallet, or view-only inheritance wallet can stay separate while still being managed together.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design: Multiple Wallets
resources.notes: Primary UX discussion of separating wallets by purpose, ownership, balance views, and switching patterns inside one app.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for wallet structure, custody tradeoffs, and the underlying payment model that multi-wallet UX organizes.
